title: Animal Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing an animal as 'mammal', 'bird', or 'reptile' based on its characteristics.
An animal is considered a 'mammal' if it gives birth to live young and produces milk, a 'bird' if it has feathers and lays eggs, and a 'reptile' if it has scales and lays eggs.
For example: 'Humans are mammals.'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given characteristics
